summary: Iteration 33: Tested new Backup & Restore feature (bulk page import/export JSON). All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_tools.py: Clean implementation with EXPORTABLE_COLLECTIONS dict (16 collections)
admin_tools.py: Export handles singleton collections (about, settings) differently from arrays
admin_tools.py: Import supports merge (upsert by id) and replace (delete all + insert) modes
admin_tools.py: Properly strips _id from MongoDB documents before insert
BackupManager.js: Good UX with Select All/None, mode toggle, file preview, and results display
AdminLayout.js: Backup entry correctly positioned at index 21 (between SEO at 20 and Settings at 22)
api.js: exportContent and importContent methods properly implemented
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data for export/import roundtrip tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup & Restore feature fully functional. Export API returns JSON with _meta containing exported_at, version, collections list. Import API accepts _mode (merge/replace) and returns results with status and count per collection.

backend_import_api.merge_mode: PASS - POST with _mode=merge upserts items without deleting existing
backend_import_api.replace_mode: PASS - POST with _mode=replace clears and re-inserts collection data
backend_import_api.singleton_handling: PASS - about/settings collections handled as single documents
backend_import_api.invalid_collections_ignored: PASS - Collections not in EXPORTABLE_COLLECTIONS are ignored
backend_import_api.full_roundtrip: PASS - Export all -> Import merge works correctly

frontend_backup_page.export_panel: PASS - Shows 16 collection checkboxes with icons
frontend_backup_page.select_all_none: PASS - Select All/None buttons toggle all checkboxes
frontend_backup_page.export_button: PASS - Shows 'Export N Collections as JSON' with correct count
frontend_backup_page.mode_toggle: PASS - Merge (teal border) and Replace (amber border) styling works
frontend_backup_page.import_button: PASS - Shows 'Merge Import' or 'Replace & Import' based on mode

sidebar_integration.backup_entry: PASS - 'Backup' with Database icon in admin sidebar
sidebar_integration.position: PASS - Between SEO (index 20) and Settings (index 22) at index 21
